title: TychoTyke 12pc Dinosaur Toys Action Figures Toy Truck Storage Playset, Orange
description:
Little paleontologists can engage in lots of prehistoric pretend play with the dinosaur toys playset, which comes with a toy truck to house all the dinosaur action figures! The toy truck also features fun lights and sounds on the front of the toy truck, making play time more fun and exciting! The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks to set up an awesome jurassic play scene

TychoTyke 12pc Dinosaur Toys Action Figures Toy Truck Storage Playset, Orange

Little paleontologists can engage in lots of prehistoric pretend play with the dinosaur toys playset, which comes with a toy truck to house all the dinosaur action figures! The toy truck also features fun lights and sounds on the front of the toy truck, making play time more fun and exciting!

The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks to set up an awesome jurassic play scene. And, whether tied up in a T Rex dinosaur toys battle or just exploring an inert love of paleontology, kids will enjoy hours of engaging pretend play with this dinosaur action figures playset! They’ll also be developing their creative imagination, dexterity and fine motor skills too whilst playing!

Key Features

  • DINOSAUR TOYS PRETEND PLAY: Little paleontologists can engage in lots of prehistoric pretend play with the dinosaur toys playset, which comes with a toy truck to house all the dinosaur action figures! The toy truck also features fun lights and sounds buttons on the front of the toy truck, making play time even more fun and exciting!
  • ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Whether tied up in a T Rex dinosaur toys battle or just exploring an inert love of paleontology, kids will enjoy hours of engaging pretend play with this dinosaur action figures playset! They’ll also be developing their creative imagination, dexterity and fine motor skills too whilst playing!
  • GREAT TOY FOR BOYS TRAVEL ITEM: With the toy trucks top carry handle, high quality nontoxic plastic construction and snap closure side compartments, the dinosaur toys transport truck is perfect for travel! When playtime is over, all the dinosaur action figures pack back into the toy truck for tidy storage, making playroom organization and clean up a breeze
  • 12PC DINOSAUR TOYS PLAYSET INCLUDES: The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks to set up your jurassic play scene! Made from durable plastic, these dinosaur toys will stand up to lots of wear and tear!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 5 x 6.5 inches; Weight: 2.3lbs; Colors: Orange, Green; Materials: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: JPDT
  • UPC: 060886037880
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: 15 in

With the toy trucks top carry handle, high quality, nontoxic plastic construction and snap closure side compartments, the dinosaur toys transport truck is perfect for travel! When playtime is over, all the dinosaur action figures pack back into the toy truck for tidy storage, making playroom organization and clean up a breeze.

12PC DINOSAUR TOYS PLAYSET INCLUDES: The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks; Made from durable plastic, these dinosaur toys will stand up to lots of wear and tear!

This is a great gift idea that will promote creativity and imagination amongst young kids who have shown interest in dinosaurs, paleontology and even geology!

Note: x3 1.5V LR44 batteries needed (included) Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts Recommended Ages: 3+ Available Colors: Orange or Green

WARNING: Button/coin batteries can cause severe injuries or even death when swallowed. Keep batteries out of reach of children. If you suspect a child has swallowed or inserted a button/coin battery, seek medical attention immediately.
